Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "console.log\('ANTHROPIC:', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.slice\(0,25\), '... len=', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.length\); console.log\('SUPA:', process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL\); console.log\('RESEND:', process.env.RESEND_API_KEY?.slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('.env.local', 'utf8'\); const line = content.split\('\\n'\).find\(l => l.startsWith\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'\)\); console.log\('RAW LINE:', JSON.stringify\(line\)\); console.log\('BYTES:', Buffer.from\(line || '', 'utf8'\).slice\(0, 50\)\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"In one sentence, what is an FD?"}]}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"In one sentence: what is an FD?\\"}]}")
Bash(npx --yes cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build)
